args.query:
SELECT replace(trim(o.OwnerId),'#','') as OwnerId,
       AVG(CAST(trim(c.CompanySignedDate) AS DATE) - CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE)) as avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = replace(trim(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND trim(c.CompanySignedDate) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT replace(trim(o.OwnerId),'#','') as OwnerId,
       AVG(CAST(trim(c.CompanySignedDate) AS DATE) - CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE)) as avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = replace(trim(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND trim(c.CompanySignedDate) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
